===Format===
* '''OneGame Pro Championship Season 1''' : ''March 29th - April 17th
** 32 teams.
** Squad, {{Abbr/TPP}}.
* '''Quarter Finals''' : ''March 29th - 31st
** 32 teams.
*** 26 invted teams.
*** 6 teams from Qualifiers.
** 3 matchdays.
** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 8 teams.
** Round-robin format.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 24 teams}} qualify for ''Semi Finals.
* '''Semi Finals''' : ''April 2nd - 3rd
** 24 teams.
** 2 matchdays.
** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8 teams.
** Round-robin format.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for the ''Grand Finals.
* '''Grand Finals''' : ''April 8th - 10th, 15th - 17th
** 16 teams.
** 6 matchdays.
